rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RITA GUGLIELMONE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Demurrer To Petition By Administrators Of The Estate Of Robert Golovich To Establish Estate'S Claim Of Ownership To Property
rulings.Rulings: Demurrer overruled. Responsive pleading due within 15 days. Request for judicial notice of the Summary of Schedules is denied. Request for judicial notice of the Discharge of Debtor and Final Decree is granted. If any party wishes to contest the tentative ruling, they must contact the probate courtroom clerk at (415) 551-3702 and opposing counsel no later than 4:00 p.m. on March 1, 2011.
